prompt: A dark, cinematic graphic-novel style book cover illustration set in a snowy mountain forest at night, with a cold blue palette and dramatic vertical composition. In the foreground, 4 human figures stand behind a red-and-white striped barrier gate blocking a forest road. The first is an adult man in a heavy dark winter jacket, carrying 1 sleeping young girl in his arms; the girl wears a padded pink snowsuit and pale winter boots, her head resting on his shoulder. Beside him stands 1 adult woman in a fur-trimmed winter parka, holding a flashlight angled downward so its warm beam cuts across the snow. Next to her stands 1 teenage boy or young man in a dark hooded winter coat, looking into the forest. On the right foreground, place 1 weathered warning sign mounted on a wooden post, showing a black pedestrian silhouette inside a red prohibition circle and diagonal slash. In the left midground, partially hidden by trees, include 1 dark off-road SUV parked on the snowy roadside. In the right midground, on the ground among the trees, place 1 dead deer with visible antlers. In the distant background between the trunks, include 2 faint, eerie humanoid silhouettes standing still in the forest. Towering pine trees frame the scene on both sides, with steep snow-dusted mountain peaks rising in the background under a clear star-filled sky. From high in the sky near the center-right, a single brilliant vertical beam of pale blue-white light descends from above into the forest, illuminating mist and suggesting a mysterious anomaly. The mood is tense, forbidden, supernatural, and survival-driven, as if for the cover of a thriller or science-fiction graphic novel titled La Réserve. Highly detailed painted realism mixed with comic-book linework, subtle rim lighting, deep shadows, realistic winter textures, cinematic suspense, no visible facial details, portrait orientation.
